name: Nytha, the Hollow Crown
text:
+1: Each opponent discards a card and loses 1 life.
−2: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains "When this creature dies, exile it."
−7: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control get +2/+2 and have menace."
flavorText: Her court is full. None of them breathe.
